title: calycomelia expansa
intro: Calycomelia expansa is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Calycomelia expansa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried, crushed, or infused in tea to utilize its medicinal properties.
